description: LLM returns a tool_use call to save feedback about testing approach

content.text: Don't mock the database in tests, use real connections

input.name: feedback-no-db-mocks
input.description: Don't mock the database in integration tests
input.content:
Integration tests must use real database connections, not mocks.
**Why:** Prior incident where mock/prod divergence masked a broken migration.
**How to apply:** Use testcontainers or t.TempDir() for SQLite in tests.
